conflicts.fix: Run sprint-dev with --mode=checkpoint (pauses before each wave's commit). For code-sweep, prefer --scan-only (default) over --loop. For release, skip --publish.

conflicts.description: User rule forbids automatic pushes to remote
conflicts.fix: Avoid --loop modes and release --publish. Manually push after reviewing each commit.

conflicts.description: User rule forbids running tests or build scripts without explicit approval
conflicts.fix: Invoke skills individually rather than chained via ship. Use --mode=interactive on sprint-dev if available.

conflicts.description: User rule requires a specific branch-naming convention
conflicts.fix: sprint-dev creates sprint-N/<role> worktree branches. release uses release/vX.Y.Z. These are fixed conventions in MVP; track override support in a future version.

conflicts.description: User rule forbids automatic branch creation
conflicts.fix: sprint-dev requires worktree branches for its isolation model and cannot be disabled in MVP. Consider using /blitz:quick for small changes that don't need sprint-dev.

conflicts.description: User rule requires all changes go through a pull request
conflicts.fix: release Phase 5.6 merges back to main. Skip --publish and manually open a PR from the release branch instead.

conflicts.description: User rule forbids automatic code fixes
conflicts.fix: Use code-sweep --scan-only (default). Run sprint-review with manual fix mode.

conflicts.description: User uses a non-npm package manager; blitz default commands use npm
conflicts.fix: Ensure package.json scripts work with your package manager. Most skills invoke `npm run <script>` which works via npm compatibility shims in pnpm/bun/yarn.

conflicts.description: User rule requires a specific commit message format
conflicts.fix: blitz uses fixed conventional-commit formats per skill (e.g., feat(sprint-N/role):). Override support is planned for a future version. For MVP, manually amend commits to add ticket refs if required.

conflicts.description: User rule prefers cheaper models than blitz defaults
conflicts.fix: Set CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL=sonnet to force all subagents to sonnet. Note that some orchestrator skills declare model: opus to survive 1M context inheritance from parent sessions (see v1.1.4 release notes).
